note: A witness sensor at a KNOWN pose cannot absorb distortion into a pose refit, so its twin-prediction divergence exposes the pose-mimicking distortion the tracked residual hides. The tracked-residual margin is ~0/negative (sim 12) while the witness margin is positive -> the witness flags BEFORE the error is dangerous. Independent redundancy (Ch.27 §27.3) closes the reconciled-twin / detect-and-flag blind spot.
